title: Midnight-Greasy American Butter Sandwich
description: This midnight-craving American dish features a buttery, gooey sandwich made with keto-friendly ingredients on white bread.
instructions: Place each slice of white bread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread keto butter evenly onto one side of each slice of bread, leaving edges without butter for sealing.
Season both sides of the bread lightly with salt and pepper.
Close the sandwiches by placing another slice of bread on top, creating an open sandwich shape.
Place in preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
